title: A Chain Of Consequence
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper (modus ponens). implication_elim(A, B) cases; by f; and by x;. (2) Uses mp. implication_intro then P := A ⊢ C; by mp(B, C, g, mp(A, B, f, P));. (3) Uses imp_trans twice. by imp_trans(A, C, D, imp_trans(A, B, C, f, g), h);.
